family.$description: Semantic font-family tokens. These are the override surface for brand-specific font swaps (e.g., decision-engine uses Geist instead of Space Grotesk). All composite typography tokens reference these — never the primitives directly.

sans.$description: Sans-serif family for titles, labels, and UI text. Base: Space Grotesk. Decision-engine override: Geist.

serif.$description: Serif family for body and long-form prose. Base: Spectral.

mono.$description: Monospaced family for code and technical UI labels. Base: JetBrains Mono.
